steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage concludes that “readers... can easily read both works.” The word “both” is decisive—it indicates the same accessibility applies to both authors' works.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: D) “similar to” matches the logic: if both approaches are similar, both works would be equally accessible. A contradicts this (unfamiliar approaches wouldn't both be accessible), C contradicts it (difficult approaches wouldn't), and B doesn't establish a meaningful relationship. This matches choice D — D is correct.
